opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is sharp and throbbing, and my ear feels completely blocked. It's the right ear and it's been getting much worse over the last few hours — nothing I take for pain is touching it and I couldn't sleep.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The ear pain has escalated over the last several hours and maximum over-the-counter pain relief isn't working, and there is thick discharge coming out.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 2 days ago as a mild itch deep in the right ear canal
symptom_narrative.duration: 48 hours, but the severe pain is the last 8-12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, throbbing deep ear pain with a blocked, full feeling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — the worst it's been, kept me awake all night and over-the-counter painkillers barely helped
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right ear, deep inside and around the ear
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now and steadily worsening over the last half day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — paracetamol only takes the edge off briefly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: chewing or moving my jaw, and touching or knocking the outer ear
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick yellowish discharge from the ear, muffled/blocked hearing on that side
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: couldn't sleep because of the pain; otherwise managing at home independently

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol 1000 mg roughly every 4 hours over the last 12 hours (about 3 g so far)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very distressed and sleep-deprived from the pain; no immediate safety concerns at home

objective_data_offered.value: the opening of the right ear looks red and there is thick yellowish discharge at the ear canal opening
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: only the outer canal opening is visible on camera; the deep canal and eardrum cannot be seen

objective_data_offered.value: it hurts sharply when I gently pull my outer ear or press the little flap at the front of the ear
the right ear feels blocked and hearing is muffled on that side
